sentence: Brotection means nothing if you showed up clavacmaxxed instead of present.

wombos.definition: Clavicles vacuum-maxxed to maximum prominence — the bone-deep form of looksmaxxing focused entirely on collarbone definition.
wombos.example: He got clavacmaxxed over the summer and now his shirt won't sit right.

wombos.definition: Protective measures taken on behalf of, or by, a bro — the bro-coded form of having someone's back.
wombos.example: When it comes to my friends, I always use brotection.
